name: ai-markdone
description: All you need for ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude & DeepSeek: reader mode, message folding, bookmarks, LaTeX copy & Markdown export.

scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:all:webext: npm run build && npm run build:safari:webext
scripts.build:chrome: tsc && vite build --config vite.config.chrome.ts && vite build --config vite.config.chrome.background.ts
scripts.build:firefox: tsc && vite build --config vite.config.firefox.ts && vite build --config vite.config.firefox.background.ts
scripts.build:safari:webext: tsc && vite build --config vite.config.safari.ts && vite build --config vite.config.safari.background.ts
scripts.postbuild:chrome: tsx scripts/prepare-extension-target.ts chrome && npm run verify:entry-format:chrome
scripts.postbuild:firefox: tsx scripts/prepare-extension-target.ts firefox && npm run verify:entry-format:firefox
scripts.postbuild:safari:webext: tsx scripts/prepare-extension-target.ts safari && npm run verify:entry-format:safari
scripts.release:verify: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:acceptance && npm run build:all:webext
scripts.package:safari:xcode: npm run build:safari:webext && xcrun safari-web-extension-converter dist-safari --project-location safari-build --bundle-identifier com.zhaoliangbin.aimarkdone --app-name "AI-MarkDone" --copy-resources --no-open --no-prompt --force
